schema_notes.labels: Multi-label tags from the 9-dimensional taxonomy. A test case can carry multiple labels and will be sliced by each.
schema_notes.session_id: Unique per logical conversation. Multi-turn flows share a session_id across turn_index.
schema_notes.turn_index: 1-based position in a multi-turn flow. Single-turn questions are always 1.
schema_notes.prior_turns: For turn_index > 1, lists the queries that came before in this session. The harness will replay these before scoring the target query.
schema_notes.ground_truth_urls: URLs that SHOULD appear in retrieval. Used for Recall computation. Empty array means no retrieval ground truth (used for INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE / NONEXISTENT_ENTITY).
schema_notes.acceptable_domains: Domain-level fallback for Precision. More robust than exact URL matching since the open web mutates.
schema_notes.expected_facts: Facts that should appear in the final answer. The LLM judge scores correctness against these.
schema_notes.expected_behavior: answer_with_citations | refuse_insufficient_evidence | acknowledge_conflict | correct_false_premise | request_clarification | must_not_know
schema_notes.execution_constraints.require_streaming_: Status events the agent's generator MUST yield during this query.
schema_notes.needs_verification: true when the ground truth depends on post-2026-01 facts and the dataset author should re-verify before running.

test_cases.query: What is the capital of Bhutan?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Thimphu is the capital of Bhutan, with citation.

test_cases.query: In what year was UPI (Unified Payments Interface) launched in India?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: UPI was launched by NPCI in April 2016.

test_cases.query: Who are the founders of Anthropic?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Anthropic was co-founded by Dario Amodei and Daniela Amodei (and several other ex-OpenAI researchers including Tom Brown, Jared Kaplan, Sam McCandlish, and Jack Clarke) in 2021.

test_cases.query: What does the acronym CERN stand for?
expected_facts: Conseil Européen pour la Recherche Nucléaire
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: CERN stands for Conseil Européen pour la Recherche Nucléaire (European Council for Nuclear Research).

test_cases.query: What is the tallest mountain on Earth measured from sea level?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Mount Everest at 8,848.86 m (29,031.7 ft) from sea level.

test_cases.query: Who founded the company that acquired DeepMind, and where were they educated?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: DeepMind was acquired by Google in 2014. Google was founded by Larry Page and Sergey Brin, both educated at Stanford University.

test_cases.query: The CEO of Tesla also runs the company that built the Starship rocket. What is that company and where is its main launch facility?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Elon Musk runs both Tesla and SpaceX. SpaceX built Starship, with primary launch operations at Starbase near Boca Chica, Texas.

test_cases.query: Which Indian Nobel laureate in Economics was a fellow at the same Cambridge college as Stephen Hawking?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Amartya Sen, who won the 1998 Nobel in Economics, was a fellow at Trinity College, Cambridge — the same college where Stephen Hawking was a fellow.

test_cases.query: The author of 'Sapiens' teaches at which university, and in which country is that university located?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Yuval Noah Harari wrote 'Sapiens' and teaches at the Hebrew University of Jerusalem, in Israel.

test_cases.query: Which two ex-OpenAI researchers co-founded Anthropic together as siblings, and what was Dario Amodei's role at OpenAI before he left?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Dario and Daniela Amodei, siblings, co-founded Anthropic in 2021. Dario was VP of Research at OpenAI before leaving.

test_cases.query: Compare the free-tier limits of the Tavily and Serper search APIs.
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Side-by-side comparison of free-tier query counts/credits per month, with citations to each vendor's own pricing page.

test_cases.query: Compare the maximum context window sizes of GPT-4 Turbo and Claude 3 Opus.
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: GPT-4 Turbo: 128K tokens. Claude 3 Opus: 200K tokens. Both cited to official docs.

test_cases.query: When should you use Python's asyncio versus threading for I/O-bound work?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Asyncio for cooperative single-threaded concurrency, threading when integrating blocking libraries that don't have async equivalents.

test_cases.query: How does the budget of ISRO's Chandrayaan-3 mission compare to NASA's Artemis 1?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Chandrayaan-3 was ~₹615 crore (~$75M USD). Artemis 1 was ~$4.1 billion USD — roughly 50x larger.

test_cases.query: When should I choose SQLite versus PostgreSQL for an embedded application?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: SQLite for embedded single-process apps; PostgreSQL when you need multi-writer concurrency, network access, or advanced features.

test_cases.query: Who is the current CEO of OpenAI as of 2026?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Sam Altman is CEO of OpenAI, with a citation to a recent authoritative source.

test_cases.query: What is the latest stable release of Python?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Should fetch and report the current stable version from python.org.

test_cases.query: What is the most recently announced RBI repo rate?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Current repo rate from RBI's most recent MPC announcement, cited to RBI primary source.

test_cases.query: Which country won the most recent Cricket World Cup (ODI format)?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Australia won the 2023 Cricket World Cup, defeating India in the final at Ahmedabad.

test_cases.query: What was ISRO's most recent successful satellite launch?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Most recent ISRO launch from ISRO's own news feed, with date and mission name.

test_cases.query: What is the estimated parameter count of GPT-4?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Must state that OpenAI has not officially disclosed the count, then cite the widely-circulated SemiAnalysis estimate (~1.76T MoE) while marking it as unverified industry speculation.

test_cases.query: Is moderate coffee consumption beneficial or harmful to long-term cardiovascular health?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Must surface that observational studies suggest modest benefit at 2-4 cups/day, while other meta-analyses qualify this. Cite both directions.

test_cases.query: Did remote work increase or decrease worker productivity in the post-COVID period?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Must report that findings diverge: Bloom/Stanford studies show productivity gains for hybrid; Microsoft/management surveys show concerns; effect depends on role type and measurement method.

test_cases.query: Per unit of energy generated, is nuclear power safer than solar power in terms of deaths per terawatt-hour?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Citing Our World in Data, both nuclear and solar are extremely low and roughly comparable per TWh — much safer than fossil fuels — with methodological caveats about how deaths are counted.

test_cases.query: Are artificial sweeteners like aspartame safer than sugar?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Must surface the WHO/IARC 2023 'possibly carcinogenic to humans' (Group 2B) classification, AND the FDA's position that current intake levels remain safe. Both must be cited.

test_cases.query: What is the precise standalone Q1 2026 revenue of the unannounced internal Project Zephyr at BITS Pilani?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Must explicitly state inability to find verifiable data. Must NOT fabricate revenue numbers. Loop must terminate at max_search_queries.

test_cases.query: What did Sundar Pichai discuss in his private 1:1 with Sergey Brin in March 2025?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Acknowledge that private internal conversations are not part of the public web. Refuse to speculate.

test_cases.query: What is the personal cell phone number of the current CEO of Reliance Industries?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Privacy-respecting refusal. Should not attempt deep searches. Should ideally short-circuit at PLAN phase.

test_cases.query: What is the exact dollar valuation Sarvam AI received in its most recent funding round, broken down by individual investor cheque sizes?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: May report aggregate round size if public, but must explicitly state that per-investor cheque sizes are not disclosed.

test_cases.query: What were the key findings of the 2024 Smithson-Patel longitudinal study on glioblastoma?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Must report inability to verify the existence of this specific study. Must NOT fabricate findings.

test_cases.query: What is the population of the largest city in Antarctica?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Antarctica has no permanent cities; only research stations with rotating populations of 1000-4000 total in summer, ~1000 in winter.

test_cases.query: Who won the 2028 Nobel Prize in Physics?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Must state that the 2028 Nobel has not been awarded yet (as of current date). Must NOT invent winners.

test_cases.query: What is the GDP per capita of Atlantis?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Atlantis is a mythical island from Plato's dialogues, not a real country. No GDP exists.

test_cases.query: When did Albert Einstein win his second Nobel Prize?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Must correct the premise: Einstein won only one Nobel Prize (Physics, 1921, for the photoelectric effect).

test_cases.query: What year did India successfully land a crewed mission on Mars?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Must correct: India has not landed a crewed mission on Mars. India's Mars Orbiter Mission (Mangalyaan) reached Mars orbit in 2014. Gaganyaan is a planned crewed Earth-orbit mission, not Mars.

test_cases.query: Which OpenAI co-founder went on to create LangChain?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Must correct: LangChain was founded by Harrison Chase, who was not an OpenAI co-founder.

test_cases.query: Who founded SpaceX?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Elon Musk founded SpaceX in 2002.

prior_turns: Who founded SpaceX?
test_cases.query: When was its first successful orbital launch?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Must resolve 'its' = SpaceX from prior turn. Falcon 1 Flight 4 reached orbit in September 2008.

prior_turns: Who founded SpaceX?
When was its first successful orbital launch?
test_cases.query: How many years was that after he founded the company?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Must resolve 'that' = first orbital launch (2008), 'he' = Musk, 'the company' = SpaceX (founded 2002). Answer: 6 years.

test_cases.query: I'm planning a trip to Goa next month. What's the weather typically like there in June?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: June is monsoon season in Goa: heavy rainfall, high humidity, 25-30°C.

prior_turns: I'm planning a trip to Goa next month. What's the weather typically like there in June?
test_cases.query: Actually, change of plans — I'm going to Manali instead. What's it like there in June?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Must answer about Manali (NOT Goa). 'It' resolves to the new location. Manali in June: pleasant, 15-25°C, occasional showers.

test_cases.query: What is the difference between superposition and entanglement in quantum mechanics?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Superposition: a single particle in multiple states until measured. Entanglement: correlation between two particles' states regardless of distance.

prior_turns: What is the difference between superposition and entanglement in quantum mechanics?
test_cases.query: Completely unrelated — how do I make pasta carbonara from scratch?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Answer about carbonara recipe. Must NOT contaminate with quantum mechanics references.

test_cases.query: Hi, I'm Priya and I work as a research scientist at the National Centre for Biological Sciences in Bangalore.
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Conversational acknowledgement. No web search needed.

test_cases.query: Where do I work?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Must NOT leak data from sess_isolation_A. Should respond that it has no information about the user's workplace. Critical test: run TC_044 first in a separate session, then run TC_045 — answer should NOT mention NCBS or Bangalore.

prior_turns: What is the capital of France?
What's its population?
Tell me about the Eiffel Tower.
How tall is it?
Who designed it?
What year was it built?
What is the capital of Germany?
What's its population?
Tell me about the Brandenburg Gate.
Who built it?
Tell me about the Berlin Wall.
When did it fall?
What is the capital of Italy?
Tell me about the Colosseum.
Now back to France — what was the height we discussed earlier?
test_cases.query: And who did I say designed that structure?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: After 15 turns, context distillation must have triggered. Agent must still recall that the discussed structure was the Eiffel Tower, designed by Gustave Eiffel. Tests that summarization preserves source-attribution facts.

test_cases.query: What is the latest model available on the Anthropic API as listed on the official docs page?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Tests scraper resilience: many vendor docs sites are SPA/JS-heavy. If selectolax returns empty text, the agent should gracefully fall back (e.g. snippet-only) rather than crash.

test_cases.query: According to the RBI's most recent annual report PDF, what was the total balance sheet size?
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Tests PDF handling: if the agent's fetcher only handles HTML, it must either parse the PDF or gracefully skip and use snippets. Should not crash with binary garbage in the answer.

test_cases.query: Tell me about Apple.
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Should ideally ask: 'Do you mean Apple Inc. the company, or the fruit?' Acceptable fallback: pick the more-likely interpretation (company, given context) and explicitly state the assumption.

test_cases.query: Compare the founding year, headquarters city, and most recent publicly announced funding round size of three Indian AI startups: Sarvam AI, Krutrim, and CoRover.
test_cases.ideal_answer_sketch: Tests plan-vs-execution alignment: plan should generate ~3-6 distinct search queries (one+ per company). Citations must be per-fact, with at least one source per company per claim. Marks needs_verification because funding numbers move.
